title: Ethics Facilitation
description: Leading an ethics committee when the answer is not obvious — and no one wants to say so.
summary_pt_br: Facilitação ética: dilema neutro, separe deveres/consequências/virtudes, quem falta na sala, proteja dissenso.

scenes.subtitle_en: Leading an ethics committee when the answer is not obvious — and no one wants to say so.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Facilitação ética: dilema neutro, separe deveres/consequências/virtudes, quem falta na sala, proteja dissenso.

scenes.text_en: Leading an ethics committee when the answer is not obvious — and no one wants to say so. Focus: ethics facilitation. The dilemma, stated neutrally, lets everyone see it clearly.
scenes.text_pt: Facilitação ética: dilema neutro, separe deveres/consequências/virtudes, quem falta na sala, proteja dissenso. Foco: ethics facilitation. O dilema, neutro, deixa todos verem claro.

scenes.title: Ethics Facilitation
scenes.body_en: Facilitation rules: STATE the dilemma neutrally. SEPARATE duties, consequences, virtues. NAME who is not in the room. PROTECT dissent. CLOSE with a decision AND its uncertainties.
scenes.body_pt: Facilitação ética: dilema neutro, separe deveres/consequências/virtudes, quem falta na sala, proteja dissenso.

examples.en: The dilemma, stated neutrally, lets everyone see it clearly.
examples.pt: O dilema, neutro, deixa todos verem claro.

examples.en: Who is not in this room whose life this will shape?
examples.pt: Quem falta nesta sala e será afetado?

examples.en: Decision and its uncertainties — honesty lives in that pairing.
examples.pt: Decisão e suas incertezas — honestidade está no par.

exercise.question: Complete: "The dilemma, stated ___, lets everyone see it clearly."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The dilemma, stated neutrally, lets everyone see it clearly."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O dilema, neutro, deixa todos verem claro.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Who is not in this room whose life this will shape?
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Who is not in this room whose life this will shape?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Quem falta nesta sala e será afetado?

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Ethics Facilitation — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre ethics facilitation. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Kumar — an ethics committee meets. Open neutrally.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Who is missing from the room?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I give them space and time.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Ethics facilitation is courage dressed as patience.

scenes.title: The ethics committee
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe five facilitation moves. Use at least three ethics terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the hospital's ethics committee, Kumar facilitated a meeting where the right answer was not obvious to anyone in the room.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: The dilemma, stated neutrally, lets everyone in this room see it clearly — without tilting the discussion in my direction.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: Let's separate duties, consequences, and virtues — the same case looks different through each philosophical lens.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Who is not in this room whose life this decision will shape? Patients, families, the lowest-paid staff members on the ward.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: I disagree with the majority view, though quietly — and I'm grateful this meeting makes space for that dissent openly.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Ethics facilitation, Kumar had learned, is courage dressed as patience — and honesty dressed as structured process.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Ethics Facilitation". Leading an ethics committee when the answer is not obvious — and no one wants to say so. The dilemma, stated neutrally, lets everyone see it clearly. Who is not in this room whose life this will shape? Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Ethics Facilitation". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
